specific_question: What percentage of first-time users on MediConn Solutions' platform completed their initial consultation in 2024?
answer: In September 2024, 81% of first-time users who created an account on MediConn Solutions' platform completed their initial consultation, with 19% abandoning the process before connecting with a healthcare professional.
dr_question: Considering the tele-health industry trends discussed in the article, how can MediConn Solutions improve patient experience in terms of trust, satisfaction, and retention in Canada by Q4 2026 to stay ahead of competitors?
